pi_items.verified_value: Department of State, established 1789
pi_items.source: U.S. History and Wikipedia sources verify 1789 as establishment year

pi_items.verified_value: Department of the Treasury, established 1789
pi_items.source: U.S. History sources confirm 1789

pi_items.verified_value: Department of Defense established July 26, 1947 as National Military Establishment, renamed to Department of Defense August 10, 1949
pi_items.source: Defense.gov and Congressional sources confirm 1947 creation date

pi_items.verified_value: Department of Justice established June 22, 1870
pi_items.source: History.gov and Department of Justice official history confirm 1870

pi_items.verified_value: Department of the Interior established March 3, 1849
pi_items.source: USGS and Interior Department official sources confirm 1849

pi_items.verified_value: Department of Agriculture established May 15, 1862 by President Abraham Lincoln
pi_items.source: USDA and White House archives confirm 1862

pi_items.verified_value: Department of Commerce and Labor established February 14, 1903; renamed to Department of Commerce March 4, 1913 when Labor was separated
pi_items.source: Library of Congress guides and U.S. History sources show 1903 for Commerce and Labor, 1913 for standalone Commerce

pi_items.verified_value: Department of Labor established March 4, 1913 when separated from Department of Commerce and Labor
pi_items.source: U.S. History and Labor Department sources confirm 1913

pi_items.key: required_departments - Department of Health and Human Services
pi_items.verified_value: Department of Health, Education, and Welfare established April 11, 1953; renamed Department of Health and Human Services May 4, 1980
pi_items.source: HHS.gov and NCBI historical records show 1953 for HEW, 1980 for HHS

pi_items.key: required_departments - Department of Housing and Urban Development
pi_items.verified_value: Department of Housing and Urban Development established September 9, 1965
pi_items.source: HUD.gov and presidential records confirm 1965

pi_items.verified_value: Department of Transportation Act signed October 15, 1966; began operations April 1, 1967
pi_items.source: DOT.gov official sources confirm 1966 as establishment year

pi_items.verified_value: Department of Energy established October 1, 1977
pi_items.source: Energy.gov historical records confirm 1977

pi_items.verified_value: Department of Education Organization Act enacted October 17, 1979; operations began May 1980
pi_items.source: Education.gov and congressional records confirm 1979

pi_items.verified_value: Department of Veterans Affairs Act signed October 25, 1988; effective March 15, 1989
pi_items.source: VA.gov official history confirms March 15, 1989

pi_items.verified_value: Homeland Security Act signed November 25, 2002; operations began March 1, 2003
pi_items.source: DHS.gov official history confirms November 25, 2002 signing date

pi_items.verified_value: National Aeronautics and Space Administration established July 29, 1958; began operations October 1, 1958
pi_items.source: NASA.gov official history confirms 1958

pi_items.verified_value: Environmental Protection Agency established December 2, 1970
pi_items.source: EPA.gov official history confirms December 2, 1970

pi_items.verified_value: Central Intelligence Agency established July 26, 1947 by National Security Act of 1947
pi_items.source: CIA.gov and historical records confirm July 26, 1947

pi_items.verified_value: Federal Communications Commission established June 19, 1934
pi_items.source: FCC official sources and Communications Act of 1934 confirm June 19, 1934

pi_items.verified_value: Securities and Exchange Commission established June 6, 1934 by Securities Exchange Act of 1934
pi_items.source: SEC.gov and historical records confirm June 6, 1934

pi_items.verified_value: Social Security Administration established August 14, 1935 by Social Security Act; originally called Social Security Board
pi_items.source: SSA.gov official history confirms August 14, 1935

pi_items.verified_value: Small Business Administration established July 30, 1953 by President Eisenhower
pi_items.source: SBA.gov official sources confirm July 30, 1953

pi_items.verified_value: United States Postal Service established by Postal Reorganization Act, effective July 1, 1971
pi_items.source: USPS official sources confirm July 1, 1971

pi_items.verified_value: National Science Foundation established by National Science Foundation Act of 1950, signed May 10, 1950
pi_items.source: NSF.gov official history confirms May 10, 1950

pi_items.verified_value: Federal Emergency Management Agency established by Executive Order, effective April 1, 1979
pi_items.source: FEMA.gov official history confirms April 1, 1979

pi_items.verified_value: President of the United States
pi_items.source: U.S. Constitution and federal government structure

pi_items.verified_value: Vice President of the United States
pi_items.source: U.S. Constitution and federal government structure

privileged_info_summary: The task creates an organizational chart of the US Executive Branch with 15 Cabinet Departments and 10 Independent Agencies with establishment dates. Verified facts: All 15 departments exist with correct names (State 1789, Treasury 1789, Defense 1947, Justice 1870, Interior 1849, Agriculture 1862, Labor 1913, Housing 1965, Transportation 1966, Energy 1977, Education 1979, Veterans 1989, Homeland 2002). All 10 agencies exist with verified dates (NASA 1958, EPA 1970, CIA 1947, FCC 1934, SEC 1934, SSA 1935, SBA 1953, USPS 1971, NSF 1950, FEMA 1979). President and Vice President roles are standard. Two discrepancies: Commerce Department listed as 1903 (should be 1913 as standalone department; 1903 refers to Commerce and Labor combined), and Health listed as 1953 (refers to HEW establishment; agency became HHS in 1980).
